headline: Jim Cramer Says Buy Lyft at $15, But Warns AST SpaceMobile Is “Losing a Fortune” and Could Fall to $40
summary: Jim Cramer just called a buy on a battered rideshare stock near a specific price floor while sounding the alarm on a once-hyped satellite name he says is burning cash fast and could slide another 30% before it deserves a second look.

headline: T1 Energy vs. First Solar: Which Solar Stock Has More Upside?
summary: Both TE and FSLR are expanding U.S. solar manufacturing as domestic demand grows. See how their growth plans and fundamentals compare.

headline: ‘That Thing Has Just Been Crushed’: Cramer On This Tech Stock
summary: "Mad Money" host Jim Cramer says AST SpaceMobile is "losing a fortune," suggests Fiserv ink a merger and praises Cheesecake Factory's menu.
